name: Avionte Staffing Platform API
what_it_does: Avionte REST API for staffing platform combining applicant tracking, onboarding, payroll, and back-office operations. Enables AI agents to manage candidate and worker records, retrieve job orders and placements, access timekeeping and payroll data, handle compliance and onboarding workflows, retrieve worker eligibility and I-9 verification data, manage billing and invoicing, access analytics across the staffing lifecycle, and integrate with HR and VMS systems.
use_cases: Managing candidate intake and onboarding from staffing automation agents
Processing timekeeping and payroll data from workforce management agents
Retrieving placement and job order data from staffing operations agents
Integrating worker compliance data from I-9 verification agents
not_for: Professional services recruiting without light industrial and clerical staffing focus
Corporate internal HR without staffing agency operations
Executive search without volume temp staffing workflows
best_when: A staffing agency with light industrial, clerical, or commercial staffing focus using Avionte wants AI agents to automate candidate onboarding, timekeeping, payroll, and compliance workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Worker PII including I-9 and work eligibility data is highly sensitive. Payroll automation requires proper tax and wage law compliance. I-9 verification data is federally regulated.

auth.notes: Avionte uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Agency-level credentials with worker and payroll scopes. Avionte Bold platform has more modern REST API than legacy Avionte. Partner marketplace for technology integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — staffing platform enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user and per-placement pricing; enterprise contracts
pricing.notes: Eagan, Minnesota. Founded 2001. Focus on light industrial and commercial staffing. Avionte Bold is their cloud-native platform. Strong light industrial and high-volume temp staffing focus. Competes with Bullhorn and TempWorks for staffing back-office.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Worker PII and I-9 eligibility data requires strict handling
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key with partner program
Avionte Classic vs Bold have different API surfaces — verify which platform is in use
Payroll automation requires wage and tax law compliance — state-by-state rules apply
I-9 verification data is federally regulated — handling requires compliance expertise
Light industrial focus — high-volume worker management patterns different from professional staffing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Worker PII, I-9, and payroll data. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA. OAuth2 + API key. US/Canadian data residency. Federal I-9 and payroll compliance mandatory.

security_score_components.security_notes: Worker PII and I-9 data. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA. OAuth2 + API key. US/Canadian residency. Federal compliance.
